'''Elya Omas''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the daughter of [[Cal Omas]], [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]]. When Cal was held captive, he was allowed by [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Jonat]] to use her comlink to contact his daughter. The conversations were recorded and used by [[Darth Caedus]] to misinform [[Ben Skywalker]] that Omas had [[Death/Legends|killed]] his [[Mara Jade Skywalker|mother]].<ref name="Inferno" />
